# Krylox

> MLOps & AI Inference Optimization Consulting. We make production AI models up to 10x faster and up to 60% cheaper.

Krylox is an engineering-led consultancy specializing in MLOps and AI inference optimization. We embed with client teams, write the code, and own the outcome — from audit to production in weeks.

## Services

- **Extreme Inference Optimization**: Latency and cost reduction using quantization, TensorRT, ONNX, and Triton Inference Server
- **End-to-End MLOps Pipelines**: CI/CD for ML, feature stores, retraining loops, canary deployments, and observability
- **Data Drift & Silent Failure Protection**: Live statistical monitoring, prediction logging, and automated redeployment pipelines
- **Reproducibility Debt Elimination**: Immutable containers, exact dependency pinning, and IaC to eliminate deployment inconsistencies

## Coverage

Serving clients across EMEA, UAE, and India.
